_comment: Target bands for probe_race_feel.gd metrics. Derived from kart-racer feel heuristics (Mario Kart-class): C1-continuous heading, input-linked speed, perceived-speed cues, consequence-bearing collisions, ceremony. A tuning iteration is GREEN when every 'must' passes.

yaw_jerk_max_deg_per_frame.why: Instantaneous heading snaps at polyline joints read as 'broken' even when unnamed. MK tracks are spline-continuous; at 60fps, 1 deg/frame = 60 deg/s max turn onset.

speed_agency_metric.why: Player input must be able to push v outside the passive [VMIN..VMAX] envelope (boost pads, tucks, wall hits). 0.0 means speed is a cutscene.

speed_range_ratio.why: Top speed (with boost) vs slowest (after a mistake) should exceed ~2.3x so speed reads as earned, not scripted.

fov_dynamic_range_deg.why: FOV should widen with speed (e.g. 58 at VMIN to 72 at boost). Fixed 60 kills the speed read regardless of m/s.

trackside_decor_per_100m.note: Non-track decor only (penguins, flags, arches, crystals) - the near-field objects streaming past create optic flow. Planks/rails excluded.

wall_hit_feedback_channels.note: count of {sound, particle burst, camera shake, haptic} fired on bounce

steer_latency63_s.note: Already in band - do not regress while fixing other items.

camera_responds_to_steering.note: lateral camera lead toward steer direction and/or roll; the world must rotate, not just the sprite translate

run_duration_s.why: 10s ends before flow starts. Lengthen track or add a second lap/section; keep under 30s for the attention span.

line_advantage_s.why: Inside vs outside cornering line must produce a real time gap. Baseline 0.00s proves lateral position is cosmetic: ds must couple to x via track curvature.

skill_time_delta_s.why: The drifter policy (steer into every bend) must beat no-input by >= 2s of the ~20s run. This is the ceiling above the autopilot floor - the floor itself stays (zero input still finishes; that is a feature for this audience, per MK8 Deluxe smart-steering philosophy).

drift_tiers_reachable.note: silver/gold/rainbow - the drifter policy must reach at least gold

no_spinout.why: Drift has no failure mode. Over-drifting caps at rainbow; the only cost of sloppy drift is the R4 wall thump.

toddler_policy_winrate.why: 5/5 instant wins the moment the window opens means the corner-him mechanic is decorative. Some tension is wanted - but see no_fail.

no_fail.why: Chase mode currently carries the game's ONLY fail state. Replace bottom-of-slide miss with a rescue beat: penguin trips, giggles, second shorter chance - always ends warm.
